dev.jeka.core.api.marshalling.json

Interface JkJson


  • public interface JkJson
    Interface representing a utility for JSON serialization and deserialization. Provides methods for converting objects to JSON and parsing JSON strings into objects.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  JkJson.Cache 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static JkJson of() 
      <T> T parse(java.lang.String json, java.lang.Class<T> valueType)
      Parses a JSON string and converts it into an object of the specified type.
      java.lang.String toJson(java.lang.Object value)
      Converts the given object into its JSON string representation.

    • Method Detail

      • of

        static JkJson of()

      • parse

        <T> T parse(java.lang.String json,
            java.lang.Class<T> valueType)
        Parses a JSON string and converts it into an object of the specified type.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of the object to return
        Parameters:
        json - the JSON string to be parsed
        valueType - the class representing the type of the object to return. It can be a generic Map witch leads in Map where numbers are mapped to `double`.
        Returns:
        an object of the specified type, created from the JSON string

      • toJson

        java.lang.String toJson(java.lang.Object value)
        Converts the given object into its JSON string representation.
        Parameters:
        value - the object to be serialized to JSON
        Returns:
        a JSON string representing the given object
